channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] Band-Maid keep popping up, I'm gonna have to give them a go too 😊
item.dc:creator: Soph 🖤 (flannelqueen.bsky.social)
item.description:
Band-Maid keep popping up, I'm gonna have to give them a go too 😊

BlueSky · flannelqueen.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] The Warning and Band-Maid are the bulk of my Playlist.
item.dc:creator: Brian (bwnash.bsky.social)
item.description:
The Warning and Band-Maid are the bulk of my Playlist.

Kanami Tono of Band-Maid is quite probably the greatest composer of this century, my opinion.

BlueSky · bwnash.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I think they did a song with Band-Maid. I like Band-Maid.
item.dc:creator: David Middleham (dmiddleham.bsky.social)
item.description:
I think they did a song with Band-Maid. I like Band-Maid.

BlueSky · dmiddleham.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] FYI I'm pretty sure the account you tagged is not BAND-MAID. They would annou...
item.dc:creator: Acer Rubrum (d-t-39810.bsky.social)
item.description:
FYI I'm pretty sure the account you tagged is not BAND-MAID. They would announce it if they had an account, and the handle would likely be suffixed by ".bandmaid.tokyo". Anyone can register a ".bsky.social" handle.

BlueSky · d-t-39810.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] @band-maid.bsky.social Please bring NEKI as support on your North American to...
item.dc:creator: Jason Nord (jknord.bsky.social)
item.description:
@band-maid.bsky.social Please bring NEKI as support on your North American tour! I am eagerly awaiting dates to be announced.

BlueSky · jknord.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 🌟 エンターテイメント関連のニュース
item.dc:creator: にゅーす! (news0.bsky.social)
item.description:
🌟 エンターテイメント関連のニュース
エンターテイメント関連では、マリオの新作映画が初登場で1位を獲得し、16億円以上の興行収入を記録しました。また、BAND-MAIDのワールドツアー情報が公開され、ファンの間で話題になっています 🎬。
🌸 雰囲気や感情
最近のニュースは、地震や政治関連の話題が多いため、少し緊張感や不安を感じるかもしれません。しかし、エンターテイメント関連のニュースは、明るく楽しい雰囲気を醸しています 🌸。
#最新ニュース #地震 #政治 #経済 #エンターテイメント #映画 #音楽

BlueSky · news0.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Band-Maid. A series of A6 cards in ink. A bit on the simplistic side I suppos...
item.dc:creator: bionicgrit.bsky.social
item.description:
Band-Maid. A series of A6 cards in ink. A bit on the simplistic side I suppose. Whoever designed their logo is a genius. 😊 #art #fanart #TraditionalArt #BandMaid #Jrock #HardRock #Japan

BlueSky · bionicgrit.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Ty Franck (half of the writing team James S.A. Corey that created The Expanse...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ty Franck (half of the writing team James S.A. Corey that created The Expanse) posted a Tweet about the best rock band he's ever heard. It was Band-Maid and he linked this live video. He was right, I was hooked instantly. www.youtube.com/watch?v=QbyQ...

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] ong, I was very conscious of our progress, and I really wanted to show anothe...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
ong, I was very conscious of our progress, and I really wanted to show another new Band-Maid. And, of course, because of the Budokan Okyu-ji. It’s like a song we will play at the end to strengthen everyone’s feeling and sense of unity, when we perform on a bigger stage in the future. Also, our maste

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Saw some guy on YouTube describe Band Maid as "more pop than Hanabie but more...
item.dc:creator: Steve Stevers (stevesteverers.whaleoilcandles.com)
item.description:
Saw some guy on YouTube describe Band Maid as "more pop than Hanabie but more technical than The Warning" and holy shit if that isn't exactly why I like them

item.title: [BlueSky] 「CENTRAL MUSIC & ENTERTAINMENT FESTIVAL 2026」
item.dc:creator: まころひー (hokkori.bsky.social)
item.description:
「CENTRAL MUSIC & ENTERTAINMENT FESTIVAL 2026」
アーカイブスゲー！
AveMujicaとBAND-MAID
言うなれば
BanG Dreamとロックは淑女の嗜みでして
圧巻でした♫

BlueSky · hokkori.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] They don't fit the mould as a rule, but Band Maid's Hate (apparently about a ...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
They don't fit the mould as a rule, but Band Maid's Hate (apparently about a guy who cheated on singer Saiki's friend) is a great angry song, and a great intro to the best rock band around. Subtitles on for this one.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] JOURNEY、NIGHT RANGER来日＆BAND-MAID出演決定！福岡で音楽イベント「THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA」初開催
item.dc:creator: Coca News (cocanews.bsky.social)
item.description:
JOURNEY、NIGHT RANGER来日＆BAND-MAID出演決定！福岡で音楽イベント「THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA」初開催

https://www.wacoca.com/news/2820204/

「THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA」（※提供画像） 福岡ソフトバンクホークスは、8月29日にみずほPayPayドーム福岡で大型音楽ライブイベント「THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA」を初 [...]

BlueSky · cocanews.bsky.social

item.description:

item.title: [Mastodon] 四月初的 CENTRAL2026 音樂祭演出限時公開啦，到台灣時間週六的 22:59 而已，要補檔的抓緊時間啊
item.dc:creator: 三頭 :raised_eyebrow_cat_2: (santou_hong@g0v.social)
item.description:
四月初的 CENTRAL2026 音樂祭演出限時公開啦，到台灣時間週六的 22:59 而已，要補檔的抓緊時間啊
https://g0v.social/tags/ReoNa https://g0v.social/tags/AveMujica https://g0v.social/tags/BANDMAID

:ave_mujica: 的片段總算改善了那個垃圾混音跟運鏡 QQ
李子大人真的好帥喔......

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DMtcR8q3e7I

Mastadon · santou_hong@g0v.social
